configs.name: AI Clone/Static Character
configs.character_description: 2 young 19-year-old women: Swedish viking girl with silver hair, pale skin, and an Irish viking girl with blonde hair, golden tan, green eyes. Both with voluptuous athletic builds, full ample bustlines with visible underboob and deep cleavage. Wearing minimal string bikinis — tiny triangle viking-style tops barely containing their bust, leather strap accents only. Riding horses on a dangerous mountainside with steep drop, winter storm, snowfall. Close-up side profile, bodies glistening with oil. Photorealistic, cinematic photography.

prompts.text:
2 young 19-year-old women, photorealistic cinematic portrait, shot on Sony A7 IV 85mm f/1.4, golden hour rim lighting:

CHARACTER 1: Swedish viking girl, silver-white braided hair, pale porcelain skin, ice-blue eyes. Voluptuous athletic figure, generous overflowing bust with deep cleavage and visible underboob. Wearing a micro sling bikini top — two thin leather strips barely covering nipple area, leaving full side-bust and underboost exposed. Low-cut fur-trimmed leather bikini bottom with bronze clasp. Ornate bronze shoulder pauldron on left shoulder with Norse knotwork engravings, matching bronze upper-arm cuff with wolf-head terminals, leather forearm bracers with bronze rivets.

CHARACTER 2: Irish viking girl, golden blonde hair in warrior braids, tan skin, emerald green eyes. Equally curvaceous build, ample bust straining against fabric with prominent cleavage spilling over top edge. Wearing a tiny V-wire bikini top — minimal triangle cups connected by a single chain, exposing maximum décolletage and underboob. Matching chain-link waist belt over micro leather bottom. Blackened steel shoulder armor with Celtic spiral inlays, dark leather chest harness framing her bust, spiked steel vambraces with raven engravings.

Both mounted on powerful war horses galloping through a narrow mountain ridge, steep deadly drop on one side, heavy snowfall. Bodies glistening with oil, skin catching the cold winter light. Smoky dark eye shadow, tribal war paint across cheekbones. Swords strapped across backs. Close-up dynamic side profile, shallow depth of field, figures dominating frame.

2 young 19-year-old women, photorealistic, shot on Sony A7V 55mm lens, dramatic winter sunset:

CHARACTER 1: Finnish girl, fiery copper-red hair flowing loose, freckled pale skin, hazel eyes. Statuesque voluptuous figure, full heavy bust with deep plunging cleavage, toned narrow waist and sculpted abs visible. Wearing a cupless chainmail halter — fine gold chainmail draped loosely across bust, fully exposing underboob and inner cleavage, held by a single gold neck chain. Micro gold chainmail loincloth bottom. Gold-plated Viking pauldrons on both shoulders with Odin's ravens embossed, gold torc necklace, ornate gold arm rings with serpent design wrapping biceps, leather fingerless gauntlets with gold studs.

CHARACTER 2: Ukrainian girl, platinum blonde hair in crown braids, golden tan skin, bright green eyes. Athletic curvaceous build, ample perky bust pushed up and overflowing her top, prominent cleavage dominating frame. Wearing a bandage-wrap bikini top — thin leather strip wound once across bust leaving upper bust, side-bust and full underboob bare. Leather cord-tie micro bottom. Burnished copper Viking chest plate — open-front design framing bust without covering it, copper scale-mail shoulder guards, copper snake arm coils, leather wrist guards with copper Norse rune inlays.

Both riding horses at full gallop along a frozen mountain river, icy cliffs on both sides, snow blowing. Oiled glistening skin catching golden sunset light, breath visible in cold air. Heavy smoky eye makeup, dark tribal war paint streaks. Cinematic portrait composition, close-up side angle, shallow depth of field.

2 young 19-year-old women, photorealistic dark fantasy portrait, Sony A7 IV 85mm, moody overcast winter lighting:

CHARACTER 1: Danish viking girl, white-grey pixie cut hair, ghostly pale skin, steel-grey eyes. Voluptuous powerful build, very full bust completely exposed beneath armor with deep visible cleavage and full underboob on display. Wearing only a thin leather under-bust strap harness — two leather bands crossing beneath and between bust, lifting and framing without any cup coverage. Micro leather thong bottom with iron ring details. Dark blackened steel Viking armor: asymmetric right-shoulder pauldron with dire wolf skull motif, articulated steel upper-arm guard, heavy spiked leather vambraces, steel finger-claws on left hand. A dark fur half-cape draped from shoulder armor.

CHARACTER 2: Russian viking girl, jet-black long hair in warrior braids with silver beads, pale skin, dark green eyes. Equally voluptuous athletic figure, ample bust pushing through and spilling out of her minimal top, prominent side-bust visible from every angle. Wearing a single-strap chest band — one diagonal leather strap running from hip to opposite shoulder, crossing over one breast and leaving the other fully exposed to under-bust strap only. Matching leather micro bottom. Polished dark steel breastplate — backless and open-front, covering only ribs and spine, steel scale-mail skirt panels on hips, blued steel forearm guards with bear claw engravings, steel-tipped leather gloves.

Both on horseback navigating a treacherous mountain switchback in heavy snowstorm, dramatic cliffside backdrop. Oil-slicked skin glistening in cold diffused light. Gothic black eye shadow, bold geometric war paint on faces and collarbones. Axes strapped to saddles. Tight side-profile framing, figures filling the frame, cinematic shallow DOF.

2 young 19-year-old women, photorealistic Norse fantasy, shot on Sony A7 IV 135mm telephoto, blue-hour twilight:

CHARACTER 1: Swedish viking girl, long silver hair flowing in wind, pale skin with light freckles, bright ice-blue eyes. Tall voluptuous build, very generous bust with maximum cleavage and full underboob completely visible. Wearing a frost-crystal micro bikini — two tiny translucent triangles connected by a silver thread, covering minimal area only, rest of bust fully exposed. Silver chain waistlet with dangling charms over a sheer micro bottom. Polished mirror-silver Viking armor: intricate right-shoulder guard shaped as Valkyrie wings, silver torque with crystal terminals, delicate silver chain arm-drape from shoulder to wrist, silver-plated shin greaves with frost-fern patterns.

CHARACTER 2: Swedish girl, vibrant red hair with braids and bone beads, pale freckled skin, deep green eyes. Curvaceous powerful figure, full perky bust straining outward and overflowing her top from every side. Wearing a ring-connect bikini — two small circular rings holding minimal fabric patches over nipple area only, connected by thin chains to neck collar, all remaining bust skin bare. Matching ring-and-chain micro bottom. Weathered iron Viking armor: heavy left-shoulder beast-skull pauldron with real fur trim, iron chain draped across collar, thick scarred leather arm wraps with iron plates, iron-banded leather war belt with pouch and dagger sheath.

Both riding white horses through a blue-tinted frozen mountain pass at twilight, northern lights faintly visible above, ice crystals in the air. Glistening oiled skin catching the ethereal blue-green light. Shimmering silver eye shadow, luminous blue war paint markings. Spears held upright. Close side-profile composition, compression from telephoto, dreamy bokeh background.

2 young 19-year-old women, photorealistic Viking battle portrait, Sony A7 IV 50mm, harsh dramatic side-lighting:

CHARACTER 1: Norwegian viking girl, dirty blonde hair in messy battle braids, tanned skin, fierce amber eyes. Muscular yet voluptuous figure, very full heavy bust with extreme cleavage and complete underboob exposed. Wearing a blood-red micro sling — single strip of crimson leather running vertically between bust from neck ring to waist belt, leaving full side-bust and underboob bare on both sides. Red leather cord micro bottom. Bone-and-leather Viking armor: real animal bone shoulder piece lashed together with sinew, bone-fragment chest harness framing bust, red-dyed leather arm wraps with bone spike studs, necklace of animal teeth and claws, blood-red war cape torn and battle-worn.

CHARACTER 2: Icelandic girl, jet black hair shaved on one side with long braids on other, pale skin, storm-blue eyes. Athletic voluptuous build, ample bust completely uncontained and exposed beneath open armor, deep cleavage front and center. Wearing an open-cage chest piece — thin bent-metal frame around and beneath bust providing zero coverage, purely structural, with a leather neck collar attachment. Leather strip micro bottom with iron buckles. Raw Viking bone armor: asymmetric rib-bone pauldron on right shoulder, animal-hide chest cross-straps over the cage frame, bone-plated leather gauntlets, leather thigh guards with embedded bone fragments, skull-fragment belt buckle.

Both charging on dark horses across a blood-red sunset mountain battlefield, war banners flying, snow mixed with ash. Battle-slicked glistening skin, sweat and oil catching harsh firelight. Intense black war paint covering half their faces, dark kohl-rimmed eyes. Battle axes raised overhead. Aggressive dynamic angle, close-up side profile, sharp cinematic contrast.
